patches.summary: Add Harris Teeter LAF and modality headers to Atlas API requests.
patches.reason: Live product, coupon, and product-detail endpoints returned LAF_OBJECTS_REQUIRED unless requests included the browser-observed location/availability/fulfillment header set.
patches.validated_outcome: Live smoke tests passed for stores, products search, products get, and coupons.

patches.summary: Let auth login fall back to a live Chrome session via agent-browser/browser-use when standalone cookie tools are missing.
patches.reason: The requested workflow uses the already logged-in Chrome session, but the generated login command exited before the existing live-browser extractor could run.
patches.validated_outcome: auth login --chrome succeeded on this machine without a standalone cookie tool by reading 50 cookies from the live Chrome session.
